The '''present tense''' in Aelaki is completely unmarked. It carries no tense prefix and no evidential or modal suffixes. The bare verb stem, without any temporal or evidential morphology, is interpreted as referring to the present moment.

== Formation ==

The present tense is formed by using the verb in its base form with no tense markers and no evidential suffixes. This makes it the simplest tense in the Aelaki system.

== Usage ==

Because the present tense is entirely unmarked, context and adverbials play a key role in disambiguating it from the [[Past|past tense]], which is also formed on the unmarked base (but requires an evidential suffix). A verb with no suffix at all is understood as present.

== See also ==

* [[Past]]
* [[Future]]
* [[Hodiernal]]
* [[Hesternal]]
* [[Crastinal]]
* [[Mythic]]

[[Category:grammatical tenses]]
[[Category:git synced pages]]
